$schema: DoveDesign serializable feature-history tree — mirrors CADFeature from CAD_ENGINE_BLUEPRINT.ts. Do not add feature types here that are not already defined in the blueprint.
description: A feature tree is the ordered, serializable list of declarative CADFeature entries attached to a SolidBoard. It is never a record of mesh edits — it is inputs that CADGeometryEngine.evaluateFeatures() consumes fresh, every recalculation, per CAD_MANIFESTO.md Law 1.

root.solidId: string — the SolidBoard.id this feature tree belongs to
root.features: CADFeature[] — ordered; order matters because later features evaluate on top of earlier ones

notes: This schema is a serialization contract, not a TypeScript source of truth. CAD_ENGINE_BLUEPRINT.ts's CADFeature union type is authoritative — if they ever diverge, the blueprint wins and this file must be updated to match.
faceId/edgeId are references into a SolidBoard's derived topology (Face[]/Edge[]), never raw indices into a vertex array.
u/v coordinates are face-local parametric coordinates, never world-space coordinates — see VECTOR_PROJECTION_MATH.md.
